description: RLS audit — verify policies on all writable tables

rls-auditor.evidence: All 114+ tables have ALTER TABLE ... ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY. 85+ tables have explicit CREATE POLICY statements. 13 dedicated RLS migration files. 0 high-risk tables without RLS. Policy patterns: owner-based (crm, sales, booking), tenant-scoped (brand portals), public read (reference libraries), service_role (analytics, audit). All writable tables (CRM, sales, booking, marketing, ecommerce, CMS, subscriptions, B2B) have full CRUD policies scoped by owner_id/brand_id/auth.uid(). Analytics tables use service_role-only write access. Reference libraries use authenticated-read + admin-write.
